About › Our practice
For all • All ages • Every stage of life

Our practice

SPORTS CLINICAL is a multidisciplinary clinical and wellbeing practice in Bassingham, near Lincoln: integrated care for movement, function and wellbeing at every stage of life.

Who we are · practice story · plain and warm, no framework language · sidebar keeps the booking route visible
Who we are

A practice built on understanding people properly

SPORTS CLINICAL was founded by Dean Haspey around a simple conviction: that people deserve to be listened to properly, assessed thoroughly, and helped for the long term, not just patched up and sent on their way. What began in sports therapy has grown into something broader: a clinic caring for people of all ages and at every stage of life, from athletes and active families to those living with pain that has quietly been there for years.

You will find us at Default Blue House in Bassingham, a village just south of Lincoln. It is a calm, unhurried setting, and that is deliberate. Appointments are never rushed, there is time to talk as well as to treat, and the care you receive is matched to you rather than to a fixed menu.

Get in touch

The easiest first step is a conversation. Tell us what is going on and we will point you the right way, with no pressure at all.

Call 07773 814488
Who you will see · both practitioners presented equally · photos placed: Dean.jpg and Rebecca.jpg as supplied · links through to the practitioner pages
Who you will see

Two practitioners, one standard of care

Dean Haspey

Clinical Lead and Neuro-Musculoskeletal Practitioner

Founded SPORTS CLINICAL and leads its clinical work. Dean specialises in all aspects of musculoskeletal therapy, neurological functioning, functional and lifestyle medicine.

Meet Dean ›

Rebecca Gallop

Advanced Clinical Sports Therapist, Health Coach and Medical Acupuncturist

Part of the practice since 2017, Rebecca combines clinical sports therapy with health coaching and medical acupuncture, with her own patients and her own approach.

Meet Rebecca ›

Experienced, genuinely interested, and on your side.

Why people feel safe here · three plain promises · accessible language only
What you can expect

Why people feel at home here

Listened to properly

Your first appointment starts with your story, not a form and a couch. Understanding what is actually going on takes time, and we give it.

Care at your pace

Everything is done gently and with your comfort in mind; nothing is rushed or forced. You stay in charge throughout.

Honest guidance

If we can help, we will say how. If something else would serve you better, we will say that too, and point you in the right direction.

Services pointer · locked eight in locked order · links through to How we help · no technique lists
How we help

From hands-on treatment to lifelong wellbeing

Care spans eight connected services, matched to you rather than delivered from a fixed menu.

  • Advanced Sports Therapy
  • Clinical Remedial Massage
  • Pain & Injury Support
  • Movement & Mobility Care
  • Integrated Rehabilitation
  • Performance & Wellbeing
  • Integrated Lifestyle Medicine
  • Medical Acupuncture
Explore how we help ›
Trust strip · navy band, badge pills removed, continuous scrolling strip of professional bodies; final list to mirror the live site strip (deep marks stay, list must not grow)
Recognised and accountable

Held to recognised professional standards

Members and registrants of the Royal Society of Medicine, the Complementary and Natural Healthcare Council, the Institute for Functional Medicine, the Society of Sports Therapists, the Institute of Sport and Remedial Massage and the British Medical Acupuncture Society, among others.
